source_pr.title: ddl: fixed update data report an error when converting from CHAR to DATETIME after adding columns
source_pr.body:
<!-- Thank you for contributing to TiDB!

PR Title Format:
1. pkg [, pkg2, pkg3]: what's changed
2. *: what's changed

-->

### What problem does this PR solve?

Issue Number: close #25383 <!-- REMOVE this line if no issue to close -->

Problem Summary:
Fixed update data report an error when converting from CHAR to DATETIME after adding columns due to default values.


```
create table t(a VARCHAR(31) NULL DEFAULT 'wwrzfwzb01j6ddj', b DECIMAL(12,0) NULL DEFAULT '-729850476163')
ALTER TABLE t ADD COLUMN x CHAR(218) NULL DEFAULT 'lkittuae' AFTER a
```

|  conn1                                                     | conn2   |
-----------------------------------------------------------|-----------
| `alter table t modify column x DATETIME NULL DEFAULT '3771-02-28 13:00:11';` ||
| |(Write Only/Write reorg) UPDATE t SET a = '18apf' WHERE x = '' AND a = 'mul';|



Update statement return the error of `[table:8038]Field '_Col$_x_0' get default value fail`.
### What is changed and how it works?

What's Changed
Cast the original default value of `oldCol` before setting it to changing column.

### Check List <!--REMOVE the items that are not applicable-->

Tests <!-- At least one of them must be included. -->

- Unit test


Side effects


### Release note <!-- bugfixes or new feature need a release note -->

- Fixed update data report an error when converting from CHAR to DATETIME after adding columns due to default values.
